{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/137-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _Why Single-Triangle Models Are Incomplete_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _Why Single-Triangle Models Are Incomplete_
2. _The Double-Triangle Architecture_
3. _Three Inter-Layer Protocols_
4. _Nautilus Portal as Reference Substrate_
5. _Pattern Library as Bridge Between Triangles_
6. _Four Deployment Domains_
7. _Open Questions_
8. _Call to Action_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md] (сходство 0.24)
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.15)
* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md] (сходство 0.15)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md]

* [251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl.md]
* [184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [1. Why Single-Triangle Models Are Incomplete|138-1-why-single-triangle-models-are-incomplete.md]
* [Abstract|136-abstract.md]
* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md]
* [Appendix B: Summary of Contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md]
* [Appendix C: Configuration Template Example|271-appendix-c-configuration-template-example.md]
* [References|268-references.md]
* [Table of Contents|154-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|253-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|308-table-of-contents.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
* [Содержание|326-содержание.md]
* [Что ты НЕ МОЖЕШЬ делать без Max approval|352-что-ты-не-можешь-делать-без-max-approval.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [Acknowledgments|224-acknowledgments.md] _37%_
* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md] _33%_
* [AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations|167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md] _33%_
* [Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md] _29%_
* [The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code|274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code.md] _29%_
* [with Anthropic's Cowork Platform|306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform.md] _29%_
* [Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)|355-существующие-документы-dhlab-твой-context.md] _29%_
* [Abstract|136-abstract.md] _21%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [Acknowledgments|146-acknowledgments.md] _37%_
* [Appendix B: Summary of Contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md] _33%_
* [AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations|167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md] _33%_
* [A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers|209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-.md] _33%_
* [Abstract|136-abstract.md] _29%_
* [1. Why Single-Triangle Models Are Incomplete|138-1-why-single-triangle-models-are-incomplete.md] _29%_
* [Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers|184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers.md] _29%_
* [References|268-references.md] _29%_
